name: eventee
description: Reads Eventee event agenda, attendee, registration, group, review, and partner data; writes documented Eventee agenda, attendee, registration, partner, speaker, and track mutations through the public REST API.

risk.read: external Eventee API reads of event agenda, attendee, registration, group, review, and partner data
risk.write: creates, updates, invites, checks in, removes, or deletes Eventee event content and attendees/registrants; destructive deletes require approval
risk.approval: reverse ETL writes require plan preview and approval token; delete actions are marked destructive
